## Download both android wali zip and ios wali zip (OpenCV)
link : https://github.com/opencv/opencv/releases? <br>
and then unzip them 🫦🫦

for android move the sdk wala folder to thirdparty/opencv/android
and for ios move opencv2.framework to the thirdparty/opencv/ios


onnx ka android ka to maine kar liya but baki tu dekh lena


ok Darling!!
